findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "list_tunings" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Catalog of all 43 AgentTune personality tuning files (slug, code, name, one-line blurb), optionally filtered by system. Use it to resolve a user's personality t…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
